Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/migrations/20260711_184910.ts','utf8'\);const b=\(s.match\(/sql\\`\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\`/\)||[]\)[1]||s;const st=b.split\(/;\\s*\\n/\).map\(x=>x.trim\(\).replace\(/\\s+/g,' '\)\).filter\(Boolean\);const n=st.filter\(x=>/ADD COLUMN \\"_?locale\\" \\"_locales\\" NOT NULL/.test\(x\) && !/DEFAULT/.test\(x\)\).length;console.log\('NOT NULL _locale adds without DEFAULT:', n\);")
